name: HVS Electric Control Globe Valve
desc: Linear electric globe valve for precise flow/pressure/temperature regulation. PN16/25, −20°C~280°C, Modbus/RS485/4-20mA.
overview: The HVS Series electric control globe valve uses a linear electric actuator with a multi-stage precision gearbox to achieve high-accuracy flow control. Designed for steam, hot water and chemical pipelines, it supports 4-20mA, RS485, M-Bus and Modbus protocols for seamless integration with building automation and industrial SCADA systems.

specs.label: Applicable media
specs.value: Cold water, hot water, high-temp hot water, saturated steam, thermal oil, clean water

features: Multi-stage precision gear drive with superior transmission accuracy for exact positioning and control
Control range configurable anywhere along full mechanical travel, covering both opening and closing directions
Supports linear and equal-percentage flow characteristics, compatible with various media and control curves
Stable operation from −20°C to 70°C; suitable for industrial, HVAC, building, and chemical pipeline environments
Dual output: fault signal output + visual alarm indicator light
Motor torque protected via electric actuator control, eliminating traditional mechanical travel switches
Accepts 4-20mA, 0-10V, digital, and Modbus signals; optional infrared remote control
Integrates multiple function modules; connects directly to building automation systems
